stages.native:
with latest as (
  select max(season::int) as latest_season
  from public.membership_packages
), counts as (
  select
    trim(p.category) as category,
    min(p.display_order) as display_order,
    p.season as season,
    count(*)::int as count
  from public.raw_members m
  join public.membership_packages p
    on m."Membership" = p.name
  join latest l
    on p.season in ((l.latest_season - 1)::text, l.latest_season::text)
  where trim(p.category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    and trim(p.category) <> ''
    and p.category is not null
    and m."Payment" in ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    and coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
  group by trim(p.category), p.season
)
select
  category,
  coalesce(max(case when season = ((select latest_season from latest) - 1)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Previous Year",
  coalesce(max(case when season = (select latest_season from latest)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Current Year"
from counts
group by category
order by min(display_order), category;

visualization_settings.card.title: Membership categories compared to last year

visualization_settings.text:
# Signup Report

This page shows information about the about the Selected Year signups.

stages.native:
SELECT
  m."First name",
  m."Last name",
  m."Gender",
  m."Age",
  m."Email address",
  m."Phone number",
  m."Mobile number",
  m."Address 1",
  m."Address 2",
  m."Address 3",
  m."Town",
  m."County",
  m."Country",
  m."Postcode",
  p.category,
  u.id,
  u.postcode AS postcode_2,
  u.latitude,
  u.longitude
FROM public.raw_members m
LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
LEFT JOIN public.ukpostcodes u
  ON upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     ) = upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     )
WHERE m."Status" = 'Active'
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
ORDER BY m."Last name", m."First name"

SELECT
  e.id AS execution_id,
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  e.mode,
  e."startedAt" AS started_at,
  e."stoppedAt" AS stopped_at,
  round(extract(epoch from (coalesce(e."stoppedAt", now()) - e."startedAt"))::numeric, 1) AS duration_seconds
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
ORDER BY e."startedAt" DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  m."Payment" AS "Payment",
  m."Status" AS "Status",
  count(*) AS "count"
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.category = 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
GROUP BY m."Payment", m."Status"
ORDER BY m."Payment", m."Status";

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
;

visualization_settings.text:
# Membership Report

This page summarizes information about the Selected Year memberships.

card.name: Count of New Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*)
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = {{year}}
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      raw_members AS m2
      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name
      AND p2.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
      AND p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
      AND p2.category <> 'Honorary'
      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  )
;

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS signup_hour, count(*) AS count
FROM public.member_signups
WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY signup_hour
ORDER BY signup_hour

SELECT signup_day, count(*) AS count
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int
      WHEN 1 THEN 'Monday'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Sunday'
    END AS signup_day,
    EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS sort_order
  FROM public.member_signups
  WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
) t
GROUP BY signup_day, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

card.name: n8n Executions by Workflow and Status

stages.native:
SELECT
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  count(*) AS execution_count,
  max(e."startedAt") AS latest_execution_at
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
GROUP BY w.name, e.status
ORDER BY w.name, e.status;

SELECT
  p.category,
  p.display_order,
  count(*) AS Count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order
ORDER BY p.display_order;

SELECT 
    s.signup_date,
    s.member,
    s.payer,
    s.product,
    b.status AS batch_status,
    x."Address 1", 
    x."Address 2", 
    x."town", 
    x."postcode",
    -- Create a simple 'True/False' column for the parent product
    CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
    
    -- Updated logic: Must not be Parent AND must not be Key AND must not be Social
    CASE 
        WHEN s.product <> '6. Parent 2026' 
         AND s.product <> 'b. Pavilion Key' 
         AND s.product <> 'a. Social 2026' 
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 
    END AS is_other_product,
    
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key,
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'a. Social 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_social

FROM "public"."signup_batches" AS b
INNER JOIN "public"."member_signups" AS s ON b.id = s.batch_id
LEFT JOIN "public"."raw_contacts" AS x ON s.payer = CONCAT(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
WHERE b.status = 'Processing'

WITH best_contact AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name"))
        CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name") AS payer_name,
        rc."Address 1",
        rc."Address 2",
        rc.town,
        rc.postcode
    FROM public.raw_contacts rc
    ORDER BY CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name"),
             CASE WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 1"), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '')) IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
processed AS (
    SELECT 
        s.payer,
        bc."Address 1",
        bc."Address 2",
        bc.town,
        bc.postcode,
        CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
        CASE WHEN s.product NOT IN ('6. Parent 2026', 'b. Pavilion Key', 'a. Social 2026') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_other_product,
        CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key
    FROM public.signup_batches AS b
    INNER JOIN public.member_signups AS s ON b.id = s.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN best_contact AS bc ON s.payer = bc.payer_name
    WHERE b.status = 'Processing'
      AND s.product <> 'a. Social 2026'
)
SELECT
    payer,
    "Address 1",
    "Address 2",
    town,
    postcode,
    SUM(is_parent_2026) AS "Parent Tags",
    SUM(is_other_product) AS "Regular Tags",
    SUM(is_key) AS "Key",
    COUNT(*) AS "Total Items"
FROM processed
GROUP BY payer, "Address 1", "Address 2", town, postcode
ORDER BY payer, "Address 1" NULLS LAST, "Address 2" NULLS LAST, town NULLS LAST, postcode NULLS LAST

card.name: Count of Non-Active Members - Previous Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
;

SELECT
  '⚙️' AS "Add Items",
  concat(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") AS "Name",
  rm."First name",
  rm."Last name",
  rm."Membership",
  rm."Email address",
  rm."Phone number",
  rm."Mobile number"
FROM public.raw_members rm
LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages mp
  ON rm."Membership" = mp.name
WHERE COALESCE(mp.category, '') <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
[[AND mp.season = {{year}}]]
[[AND concat(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") ILIKE '%' || {{search}} || '%']]
ORDER BY rm."Last name", rm."First name", rm."Membership";

card.name: List of New Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  *
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = {{year}}
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      raw_members AS m2
      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name
      AND p2.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
      AND p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
      AND p2.category <> 'Honorary'
      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  )
;

card.name: Count of Non-Active Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
;

SELECT
  signup_date,
  member,
  product,
  payer,
  cost,
  quantity,
  method,
  status,
  "Tags provided",
  id,
  clubspark_status,
  batch_id
FROM member_signups
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM signup_date) = ({{year}})::int
ORDER BY signup_date DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  b.id AS batch_id,
  b.status,
  b.created_at,
  b.completed_at,
  b.no_address_email_sent,
  count(ms.id) AS member_row_count,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE ms.product NOT IN ('6. Parent 2026', 'b. Pavilion Key', 'a. Social 2026')) AS regular_tags,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE ms.product = '6. Parent 2026') AS parent_tags,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE ms.product = 'b. Pavilion Key') AS keys,
  'Labels' AS link_label,
  'Envelopes' AS secondary_label,
  CASE WHEN b.status = 'Complete' AND NOT b.no_address_email_sent THEN 'Send Emails' ELSE NULL END AS email_no_address_label
FROM signup_batches AS b
LEFT JOIN member_signups AS ms
  ON ms.batch_id = b.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.status, b.created_at, b.completed_at, b.no_address_email_sent
ORDER BY b.id DESC;

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" = 'Active';

card.name: List of Members Not Renewed - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  *
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = ((({{year}})::int) - 1)::text
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      raw_members AS m2
      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name
      AND p2.season = {{year}}
    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
      AND p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
      AND p2.category <> 'Honorary'
      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  );

with latest as (
  select max(season::int) as latest_season
  from public.membership_packages
), source_rows as (
  select
    case
      when m."Age" is null then null
      when m."Age" >= 90 then '90-99'
      else lpad((floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10)::text, 2, '0') || '-' || lpad((floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10 + 9)::text, 2, '0')
    end as age_range,
    case
      when m."Age" is null then null
      when m."Age" >= 90 then 90
      else (floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10)::int
    end as age_sort,
    p.season
  from public.raw_members m
  join public.membership_packages p
    on m."Membership" = p.name
  join latest l
    on p.season in ((l.latest_season - 1)::text, l.latest_season::text)
  where p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
    and p.category is not null
    and m."Payment" in ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    and m."Age" is not null
    and coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
), counts as (
  select age_range, age_sort, season, count(*)::int as count
  from source_rows
  group by age_range, age_sort, season
)
select
  age_range as "Age Range",
  coalesce(max(case when season = ((select latest_season from latest) - 1)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Previous Year",
  coalesce(max(case when season = (select latest_season from latest)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Current Year"
from counts
group by age_range, age_sort
order by age_sort;

card.name: Count of Members Not Renewed - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*)
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = ((({{year}})::int) - 1)::text
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      raw_members AS m2
      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name
      AND p2.season = {{year}}
    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
      AND p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
      AND p2.category <> 'Honorary'
      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  )
;

SELECT p.category AS category, count(*) AS count FROM public.raw_members AS m JOIN public.membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name WHERE p.season = {{year}} AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key' AND m."Status" = 'Active' AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid') AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order ORDER BY p.display_order;
